intro: Octarrhena reflexa, also known as the reflex Octarrhena, is a species of orchid native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering health benefits such as antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which can aid in the treatment of various infections and skin conditions. The bioactive constituents of Octarrhena reflexa include alkaloids, particularly aristolochic acid and Octarrhena alkaloids, which possess potent pharmacological activities.
